site.description: ToolNest is a collection of free, fast online tools that run entirely in your browser. No sign-up, and your data never leaves your device.

home.statsNone: Tools are rolling out — stay tuned.

base64.name: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.description: Convert text to and from Base64.

url.name: URL Encode / Decode
url.description: Percent-encode and decode URLs and query parameters.

hash.name: Hash Generator
hash.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 hashes.

timezone.name: Timezone & Timestamp
timezone.description: Convert Unix timestamps and dates, and compare live across timezones.

calculator.name: Scientific Calculator
calculator.description: Basic arithmetic plus common scientific functions.

qrcode.name: QR Code Generator
qrcode.description: Turn text or a link into a QR code and download it.
